title: Squirrel Removal in Brownsville, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Brownsville, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Brownsville homes. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Brownsville home through the attic, roof, or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Brownsville, Brooklyn, protecting residential properties from these persistent rodents. Our humane removal methods and permanent exclusion solutions ensure your home stays squirrel-free year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Brownsville residents for years with fast, reliable squirrel removal services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's housing stock and provide customized solutions with upfront pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Brownsville's mix of NYCHA developments, brownstones, and multi-family homes near Betsy Head Park and along Pitkin Avenue are frequently targeted by squirrels seeking shelter and nesting sites. The mature trees throughout the neighborhood and proximity to green spaces create ideal conditions for squirrel populations that often find their way into attics, soffits, and roof vents.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Brownsville?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Brownsville typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Brownsville homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Brownsville homes through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, and openings where utility lines enter the building. Older Brooklyn homes often have small structural gaps that squirrels can chew through and expand. They're particularly active in fall and spring when seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Brownsville humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, NYC-compliant removal methods including live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return. We never use poisons or harmful techniques. After removal, we seal all entry points to prevent re-entry and can provide attic restoration if needed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Brownsville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Brownsville residents in most cases. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Our technicians will set traps during the initial visit and return for monitoring, removal, and permanent exclusion work to completely solve your squirrel problem.
